headline: Western Digital’s Long Contracts Recast AI Storage Growth And Valuation
summary: Western Digital has secured new long term purchase commitments for high capacity storage from key customers, extending into 2027 and 2028. The agreements build on previously disclosed 2026 commitments and shift more of the business onto multi year contracts. The move reflects growing demand tied to AI and hyperscale data centers and gives Western Digital greater visibility on future supply needs. Western Digital (NasdaqGS:WDC) is stepping into this new phase with a share price of $301.05,...
